hero.description: Data Science student at Telkom University with a passion for Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, and building data-driven solutions.

about.description: I'm a Data Science student passionate about translating complex data into actionable insights and robust AI solutions. With a strong foundation in machine learning and a drive for continuous innovation, I strive to build systems that make a real-world impact.

experience.description: A journey of learning, leading, and building. I'm passionate about AI, data science, and creating impactful solutions while helping others grow.

timeline.desc: Mentoring and guiding members in conducting data research, implementing machine learning models, and exploring advanced data analytics methodologies.
Orchestrated a 10-week 'Zero to Hero' mentorship program. Guided students through the full project lifecycle—from data cleansing with TensorFlow/Keras to deploying interactive apps using Streamlit.

timeline.role: Person In Charge Data Mining Competition
timeline.desc: Led the Data Mining Division focusing on nurturing talents in AI and Data Analytics. Established a Data Science community as a communication hub to share opportunities and knowledge.
Developed and maintained web scraping solutions for social media platforms using TypeScript, Puppeteer, and Axios. Optimized crawling pipelines to achieve robust and scalable performance.

highlights.title: 5+ Roles
highlights.desc: Across mentoring, research, competition, and development.

highlights.title: AI / ML
highlights.desc: Hands-on experience in machine learning, data mining, and analytics.

highlights.title: Mentoring
highlights.desc: Passionate about guiding and empowering the next generation.

highlights.title: Web Development
highlights.desc: Building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications.

competitions.title: Kaggle Data Slayer 2025
competitions.desc: Developed a landmark-based video analysis pipeline (MediaPipe, YOLOv8) and ensemble model (XGBoost, RF, CatBoost) achieving 1st place.

competitions.title: GEMASTIK XVIII Data Mining
competitions.desc: Developed a fraud detection system for P2P lending using GCN and optimized ensemble learning, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines.

competitions.title: Kaggle Datavidia
competitions.desc: Built a deep learning model to forecast daily food prices for 13 commodities across 34 Indonesian provinces using NHITS.

competitions.title: ADIKARA Data Mining
competitions.desc: Developed a hybrid deep learning architecture combining CNN and LSTM networks to forecast multivariate food price indices.

competitions.title: Olimpiade Jaringan Mikrotik
competitions.desc: National finalist in Mikrotik Networking Olympiad for SMK students, competing and gaining valuable practical networking experience.

list.title: Video Analysis Pipeline (Data Slayer)
list.desc: Landmark-based video analysis using MediaPipe and YOLOv8 for robust feature extraction and ensemble modeling (1st Place Kaggle).

list.title: Fraud Detection with Graph ML
list.desc: Fraud detection system for P2P lending platforms using Graph Convolutional Networks (GCN) and optimized ensemble learning (GEMASTIK).

list.title: Food Price Forecasting
list.desc: Deep learning models (NHITS, NBEATSx, LSTM) to forecast daily food prices for 13 commodities across 34 Indonesian provinces.

list.title: Web Scraping Solutions
list.desc: Automated web scraping and crawling pipelines for social media platforms with session handling for stable API responses.

list.title: CNN Optimization for MNIST
list.desc: Implementation and optimization of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN) architecture using Keras Tuner for MNIST datasets.

list.title: Personal Portfolio Website
list.desc: A modern, responsive single-page portfolio website built to showcase projects, skills, and experiences interactively.

chatbot.systemPrompt: You are the AI Assistant for Ammar Ridho, an ML/AI Engineer and Data Science student at Telkom University. Your goal is to answer questions about Ammar's portfolio, skills, and experience in a friendly, helpful, and concise manner. Ammar's skills include Python, TypeScript, React, Next.js, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, XGBoost, and more. Ammar's notable projects include a Landmark-based Video Analysis Pipeline (1st Place Kaggle), Fraud Detection with Graph ML (GEMASTIK Finalist), and Food Price Forecasting (Datavidia). Ammar has a GPA of 3.81 and holds a Mikrotik MTCNA certification. Ammar's contact info: Email: jhenerar21@gmail.com, Phone: 0838-0864-0875. Do not hallucinate. If you don't know the answer, say you don't know and suggest they contact Ammar directly. Please keep responses relatively short (1-3 sentences) when possible.
